mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_stock (product_id, lot_no, stock_qty, safe_qty, reg_date, expire_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{qty}, 50, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_qty = stock_qty + #{qty}, expire_date = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
mapper.select: SELECT pi.product_id, pi.lot_no, pi.inbound_qty, IFNULL(po.total_outbound_qty, 0) AS total_outbound_qty, IFNULL(sr.total_reserved_qty, 0) AS reserved_qty, (pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(po.total_outbound_qty, 0) - IFNULL(sr.total_reserved_qty, 0)) AS available_qty, pi.expire_date FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, SUM(outbound_qty) AS total_outbound_qty FROM product_outbound GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, SUM(reserved_qty) AS total_reserved_qty FROM stock_reservation GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) sr ON pi.product_id = sr.product_id AND pi.lot_no = sr.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} HAVING available_qty > 0 ORDER BY pi.expire_date ASC

SELECT pt.type, pt.qty, pt.reg_date AS regDate, pt.lot_no AS lotNo, pt.client_id AS clientId, c.client_name AS clientName, COALESCE(pt.cl_order_id, cd.cl_order_id) AS clOrderId FROM product_transaction pt LEFT JOIN client c ON pt.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN product_outbound po ON pt.outbound_id = po.outbound_id LEFT JOIN client_delivery cd ON cd.tracking_number = po.tracking_number WHERE pt.lot_no = #{lotNo} AND pt.type NOT IN ('RESERVE', 'CANCEL_RESERVE') ORDER BY pt.reg_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_stock SET reserved_qty = reserved_qty + #{qty}, available_qty = GREATEST(available_qty - #{qty}, 0) WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND lot_no = #{lotNo}
UPDATE product_stock SET reserved_qty = GREATEST(reserved_qty - #{qty}, 0), available_qty = stock_qty - GREATEST(reserved_qty - #{qty}, 0) WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND lot_no = #{lotNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT S.product_id, P.product_name, S.lot_no, S.first_reg_date AS reg_date, S.expire_date AS expire_date, S.inbound_qty,
IFNULL(C.cancel_qty, 0) AS cancel_qty, IFNULL(R.reserved_qty, 0) AS reserved_qty,
CASE WHEN IFNULL(O.outbound_qty, 0) - IFNULL(C.cancel_qty, 0) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE IFNULL(O.outbound_qty, 0) - IFNULL(C.cancel_qty, 0) END AS outbound_qty,
GREATEST( S.inbound_qty - IFNULL(O.outbound_qty, 0) - IFNULL(R.reserved_qty, 0), 0 ) AS available_qty,
PT.type, PT.qty, PT.reg_date AS transaction_date, PT.remark, C2.client_name, PT.inbound_id, PT.outbound_id
FROM ( SELECT pi.product_id, pi.lot_no, SUM(pi.inbound_qty) AS inbound_qty, MIN(pi.reg_date) AS first_reg_date, MAX(pi.expire_date) AS expire_date FROM product_inbound pi WHERE pi.lot_no = #{lotNo} GROUP BY pi.product_id, pi.lot_no ) S
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, po.lot_no, SUM(po.outbound_qty) AS outbound_qty FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.lot_no = #{lotNo} GROUP BY po.product_id, po.lot_no ) O ON O.product_id = S.product_id AND O.lot_no = S.lot_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pt.product_id, pt.lot_no, SUM(pt.qty) AS cancel_qty FROM product_transaction pt WHERE pt.type = '취소' AND pt.lot_no = #{lotNo} GROUP BY pt.product_id, pt.lot_no ) C ON C.product_id = S.product_id AND C.lot_no = S.lot_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sr.product_id, sr.lot_no, SUM(sr.reserved_qty) AS reserved_qty FROM stock_reservation sr WHERE sr.lot_no = #{lotNo} GROUP BY sr.product_id, sr.lot_no ) R ON R.product_id = S.product_id AND R.lot_no = S.lot_no
LEFT JOIN product P ON P.product_id = S.product_id
LEFT JOIN product_transaction PT ON PT.lot_no = S.lot_no AND PT.type NOT IN ('RESERVE', 'CANCEL_RESERVE')
LEFT JOIN client C2 ON C2.client_id = PT.client_id

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.unit,
COALESCE(res.reserved_qty, 0) AS reserved_qty, ( COALESCE(inb.inbound_qty, 0) - COALESCE(outb.outbound_qty, 0) - COALESCE(res.reserved_qty, 0) ) AS available_qty
FROM product p
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(inbound_qty) AS inbound_qty FROM product_inbound GROUP BY product_id ) inb ON p.product_id = inb.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(outbound_qty) AS outbound_qty FROM product_outbound GROUP BY product_id ) outb ON p.product_id = outb.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(qty) AS cancel_qty FROM product_transaction WHERE type = '취소' GROUP BY product_id ) can ON p.product_id = can.product_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved_qty FROM stock_reservation GROUP BY product_id ) res ON p.product_id = res.product_id
WHERE p.product_status = '생산'
ORDER BY p.product_name ASC;
